signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Ultra-high net worth consumers with a net worth above $20 million own on average 3.7 homes... spend 6.4x more on home furnishings — RH's target customer is insulated from typical consumer stress dynamics; no trade-down language present.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: You're looking at $150 million to $170 million a year [in future capex] — capital investment period is explicitly described as post-peak and declining from current elevated levels.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We've always been more promotional than less promotional in times like these — signals willingness to use price as a demand lever, indicating moderate rather than strong pricing power in the current environment.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We believe it's prudent to plan conservatively this year due to uncertainties around interest rates and inflation — explicit conservatism embedded in guidance language, a shift from prior growth-forward framing.
